title: ERP-MES Printing (ISA-95)
description: Printing industry overlay for erp-mes-core: flexo press fleet, film/ink materials, Flexibase event code catalog (OGP/BM/POUCH), Zero Pull setup tags, job bag sections
changelog: 1.1.0 - operator UI rework: flat widget format, dropdown selects from catalog reports, row-click autofill, KPI cards, event journal; +2 catalog reports (eventdef, setuptag); requires erp-mes-core 1.1.0

changelog.notes: 1.1.0: operator UI rework - flat dashboard widget format (no settingsJson), dropdown selects fed by catalog reports, row-click autofill into forms, KPI value cards, event journal report
Initial release: flexo printing overlay on erp-mes-core 1.0.0, certified by ErpMesPrintingOverlayTest cross-bundle scenarios
